issues.original_text: scale factor computation introduces a minor overhead for MXF8 and MXF4.
issues.description: The term 'scale factor' in the context of MX (Microscaling) data formats is more commonly and professionally translated as '缩放因子' rather than '比例因子' in GPU architecture literature.
issues.why_it_matters: Using the precise industry-standard terminology enhances the professional tone and aligns with how hardware engineers discuss MX data types.
issues.suggestion: Change '比例因子计算' to '缩放因子计算'.
